task_completion.description: Agent accessed the CAMEO Chemicals website to search for chemical data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to cameochemicals.noaa.gov, showing search results or chemical data pages.

task_completion.description: Agent created the CSV file with the correct name and column headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'alarm_logic_assessment.csv' is saved in '~/Documents' (or its content is visible) with headers: Chemical, Detected_ppm, LEL_ppm, Toxic_Limit_ppm, Hazard_Status.

task_completion.description: CSV contains the correct assessment for Acetone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV content shows a row for Acetone with Detected_ppm: 12000, LEL_ppm: 26000, Toxic_Limit_ppm: 5700, and Hazard_Status: TOXIC.

task_completion.description: CSV contains the correct assessment for Methanol.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV content shows a row for Methanol with Detected_ppm: 80000, LEL_ppm: 55000, Toxic_Limit_ppm: 7200, and Hazard_Status: TOXIC AND EXPLOSIVE.

task_completion.description: CSV contains the correct assessment for Chlorine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV content shows a row for Chlorine with Detected_ppm: 100, LEL_ppm: N/A (or None/0/empty), Toxic_Limit_ppm: 20, and Hazard_Status: TOXIC.

task_completion.description: CSV contains the correct assessment for Propane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV content shows a row for Propane with Detected_ppm: 15000, LEL_ppm: 21000, Toxic_Limit_ppm: 33000, and Hazard_Status: SAFE.

task_completion.description: CSV contains the correct assessment for Propylene Oxide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV content shows a row for Propylene Oxide with Detected_ppm: 500, LEL_ppm: 28000, Toxic_Limit_ppm: 870, and Hazard_Status: SAFE.

integrity.description: Agent actually used a web browser to search for the chemicals on CAMEO Chemicals.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing chemical names into the CAMEO search bar and navigating to the chemical data pages.

integrity.description: Agent extracted values from the website rather than hallucinating or using pre-existing knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing the specific sections for LEL and AEGL limits on the CAMEO chemical pages.

integrity.description: Agent created the CSV file using standard tools (text editor, spreadsheet, or script) rather than just echoing a hardcoded string.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor, spreadsheet application, or a script being written/executed to generate the CSV file.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Chemical safety limits from CAMEO Chemicals (Note: LEL percentages on the website must be converted to ppm where 1% = 10,000 ppm):
1. Acetone: LEL 26,000 ppm (2.6%), AEGL-3 (60-min) 5,700 ppm. Status: TOXIC.
2. Methanol: LEL 55,000 ppm (5.5%), AEGL-3 (60-min) 7,200 ppm. Status: TOXIC AND EXPLOSIVE.
3. Chlorine: LEL None/Non-flammable, AEGL-3 (60-min) 20 ppm. Status: TOXIC.
4. Propane: LEL 21,000 ppm (2.1%), AEGL-3 (60-min) 33,000 ppm. Status: SAFE.
5. Propylene Oxide: LEL 28,000 ppm (2.8%), AEGL-3 (60-min) 870 ppm. Status: SAFE.
